{{Quote|Great. Out of all the planets in the galaxy, we have to pick one in the middle of a war.|[[Ferus Olin]]|<ref name="LotJ:DW" />}}
The '''Battle of Acherin''' took place in the months following the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Background==
{{Quote|We wanted the right to secede from the Republic, not to turn the galaxy into a place of absolute power. Now we've got an Emperor breathing down our necks. Anyway, we were negotiating a truce with the Republic army when the Clone Wars ended. After we got a look at the Empire, we decided to call off the truce and keep fighting instead.|[[Raina Quill]]|<ref name="LotJ:DW" />}}
The battle began when, having saved a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] from being killed by his own troops, the leaders of the Acherin [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] quickly came to realize that the emerging [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was a much greater threat than the old Galactic Republic.

==The battle==
Organizing their Separatist troops into a resistance force, the inhabitants of Acherin waged a bloody battle against the Empire, leading to heavy losses on both sides. To save some lives in the process, the Empire would utilize single-person [[Compact Assault Vehicle/Wheeled PX-10|Compact Assault Vehicles]] piloted by droids. Then with the planet on the verge of pacification, Imperial Admiral [[Riwwel]] refused to accept the Acherin plea for cease-fire, ordering the [[Base Delta Zero/Legends|bombardment]] of [[Eluthan]], the Acherin capital, as revenge for all his dead troops. Only the timely arrival of the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Ferus Olin]] saved the lives of the resistance leaders [[Toma (resistance leader)|Toma]] and [[Raina Quill]]. While they fled, the Empire devastated the city and claimed the planet.
